channel.title: SB 5863 - Concerning the preservation and inspection of state historical records.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍💵Stacy Dym - The Arc of Washington State
item.description: Stacy Dym signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent The Arc of Washington State. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: First reading, referred to State Government, Tribal Affairs & Elections.
item.description: First reading, referred to State Government, Tribal Affairs & Elections.

item.description: Jessica Renner signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Self Advocates in Leadership (SAIL).

item.description: Erin Dahlman-Oeth signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Leslie Widing - Self Advocates in Leadership (SAIL)
item.description: Leslie Widing signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: Kicking off the 2026 session - Sen. Claudia Kauffman
item.description: News article "Kicking off the 2026 session - Sen. Claudia Kauffman" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: SGTE - Majority; do pass.
item.description: SGTE - Majority; do pass.
